prompt: When a new lead submits a Google Form, use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to categorize their interest level from the form data. Send a tailored follow-up email via Gmail to 'lead@example.com' with subject 'Welcome', then append the lead details to Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1BxiMVs0XRYFgwnmacXYZ' on sheetName 'Leads' with range 'A:D'.

Every morning, fetch the latest blog posts by making a GET HTTP request to endpoint 'https://api.rss2json.com/v1/api.json', summarize them using Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large'. Then send the summaries to a Discord channel using webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/abc'.

Read data from Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1BxiMVs0XRYFgwnmacXYZ' on sheetName 'Topics' range 'A:B' using 'read' action. Loop through the rows sequentially, use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to generate a detailed blog outline for each topic, then save each outline as a new document in Google Drive folderId '1DriveFolderXYZ'.

When a webhook is received via HTTP POST request at endpoint 'https://api.example.com/webhook', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to generate relevant hashtags and trending keywords. Then append the post link and suggested tags to a Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1BxiMVs0XRYFgwnmacXYZ' on sheetName 'Hashtags' range 'A:C'.

Manually trigger a workflow that fetches pricing data by making a GET HTTP request to endpoint 'https://api.competitor.com/pricing'. Use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to analyze market positioning, and send a summary report via Gmail to 'strategy@company.com' with the subject 'Competitor Analysis Report'.

When a high-priority server alert is received via HTTP POST request at endpoint 'https://api.alerts.com/webhook', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to analyze the error logs. Post the suggested immediate troubleshooting steps to a Discord channel using webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/devops'.

Whenever a new issue is opened in GitHub via an HTTP GET reqeust to endpoint 'https://api.github.com/repos/org/repo/issues', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to automatically label it based on content. Send a notification with the proposed labels to Discord using webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/github'.

Manually trigger a workflow that fetches daily cloud infrastructure costs via a GET HTTP request to endpoint 'https://api.cloud.com/costs'. Use an IF condition to check if the spending exceeds a threshold, and if so, send an alert email via Gmail to 'admin@company.com' with subject 'High Cloud Costs Alert'.

When a Google Form is submitted for a new software access request, use an IF node to check the department. If IT, automatically trigger a POST HTTP request to endpoint 'https://api.internal.com/access' to grant access. Otherwise, forward the request via Gmail to 'support@company.com' with subject 'Access Request Needs Approval'.

When a new security log file is uploaded to Google Drive folderId '1DriveFolderXYZ', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to scan for anomalous behavior. Use an IF node to determine if threats are detected, and send a critical alert to Discord using webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/security'.

Read data from Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1CRMSheet123' on sheetName 'Leads' range 'A:D' using 'read' action. Use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to research the company recent news and draft a personalized outreach email, then send it via Gmail to 'prospect@company.com' with subject 'Collaboration Opportunity'.

When an email is received from a potential lead via Gmail from 'contact@lead.com', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to perform sentiment analysis. Append the lead status in a Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1CRMSheet123' on sheetName 'Status' range 'A:C' using 'append' action.

Manually trigger a workflow that reads a LinkedIn profile URL from a Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1CRMSheet123' on sheetName 'Profiles' range 'A:B' using 'read'. Use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to draft a unique icebreaker message, and send it via Gmail to 'sales@company.com' with subject 'Icebreaker Draft'.

On a Google Form submission for a demo request, use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to qualify the lead based on their responses. Use an IF node to check criteria, and if met, send a personalized scheduling link via Gmail to 'lead@company.com' with subject 'Schedule your demo'.

Read sales performance data from a Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1SalesSheet456' on sheetName 'WeeklyData' range 'A:F' using 'read'. Use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to summarize the data, and post the key insights and trends to a Discord channel using webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/sales'.

When a new invoice PDF is uploaded to Google Drive folderId '1InvoiceFolderXYZ', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to extract the invoice number, date, and total amount. Append this information to a master Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1FinanceSheet789' on sheetName 'Invoices' range 'A:E' using 'append' action.

On a Google Form submission containing contract details, use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to draft standard contract text. Create a new document with this text in Google Drive folderId '1ContractsFolderXYZ'.

Manually trigger a workflow that reads from Google Drive folderId '1FilesFolderXYZ'. Loop through the files sequentially, use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to generate a file name from its content, and update the file in Google Drive.

When a POST HTTP request is received at endpoint 'https://api.signatures.com/webhook', download the signed PDF from Google Drive folderId '1SignedDocsXYZ', and send a confirmation email via Gmail to 'client@company.com' with subject 'Your signed document'.

Read data from a Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1DocsSheet123' on sheetName 'Metadata' range 'A:D' using 'read'. Use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to generate a 2-sentence summary, and save it as a text file in Google Drive folderId '1SummaryFolderXYZ'.

When a POST HTTP request is received at endpoint 'https://api.support.com/webhook', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to suggest the most likely solution. Draft a reply email in Gmail to 'agent@company.com' with subject 'Ticket Suggested Reply'.

On a Google Form submission for a bug report, use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to extract clear reproduction steps. Create a new issue via a POST HTTP request to endpoint 'https://api.github.com/repos/org/repo/issues' with the necessary headers and body.

Fetch the latest tweets via a GET HTTP request to endpoint 'https://api.twitter.com/2/tweets/search/recent'. Use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to detect sentiment. Use an IF node to check for negative feedback, and send it to Discord using webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/support'.

When a customer inquiry is received via Gmail from 'customer@email.com', use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to classify it. Use a SWITCH node to route it: if Technical, send to Discord webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/tech'; otherwise reply via Gmail to 'support@company.com' with subject 'Inquiry routed'.

Manually trigger a workflow to read unresolved support tickets from Google Sheet with spreadsheetId '1SupportSheet123' on sheetName 'Tickets' range 'A:E' using 'read'. Use Mistral AI with model 'mistral-large' to prioritize them, and post a summary to Discord using webhookUrl 'https://discord.com/api/webhooks/123/triage'.
